headline: Cerebras soars 109% in market debut as AI chip frenzy grips Wall Street
summary: Cerebras Systems made a stunning stock market debut on Thursday, with shares of the artificial intelligence chipmaker surging as much as 109% above its IPO price as investor appetite for AI-linked plays showed no sign of cooling. headline: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO Gets Blowback From Pension Funds: Here's What Prediction Markets Are Watching
summary: The three largest US public pension funds demanded Elon Musk rewrite SpaceX's IPO governance, but Polymarket still prices a June listing at 71%.
